title: carduus defloratus subsp. paui
intro: Carduus defloratus subsp. paui, also known as Paui's cardoon, is a subspecies of the Carduus defloratus plant, a type of thistle native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carduus defloratus subsp. paui include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and the treatment of respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and combat various health conditions.
